mapper.sql: select s.id, s.tenant_id, s.bill_no, s.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, s.wh_settlement_id, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.audit_by, s.audit_time, s.audit_status, s.del_flag, s.delete_by, s.delete_time, s.remark from supp_settlement_bill s
mapper.select: where s.id = #{id} and (s.del_flag = 0 or s.del_flag is null) and s.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert: insert into supp_settlement_bill (id, tenant_id, bill_no, supplier_id, supplier_name, wh_settlement_id, create_by, create_time, audit_by, audit_time, audit_status, del_flag, delete_by, delete_time, remark, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{billNo}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{whSettlementId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, 0, 0, #{deleteBy}, #{deleteTime}, #{remark}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})

insert into supp_settlement_bill_entry (id, tenant_id, paren_id, bill_no, wh_settlement_id, wh_settlement_bill_no, wh_settlement_entry_id, material_id, material_name, speci, model, unit, unit_price, qty, amt, batch_number, end_time, batch_no, factory_id, factory_code, factory_name, source_bill_type, source_bill_id, source_bill_no, source_entry_id, supplier_id, supplier_name, del_flag, sort_order, create_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{parenId}, #{billNo}, #{whSettlementId}, #{whSettlementBillNo}, #{whSettlementEntryId}, #{materialId}, #{materialName}, #{speci}, #{model}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice}, #{qty}, #{amt}, #{batchNumber}, #{endTime}, #{batchNo}, #{factoryId}, #{factoryCode}, #{factoryName}, #{sourceBillType}, #{sourceBillId}, #{sourceBillNo}, #{sourceEntryId}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, 0, #{sortOrder}, now())

insert into supp_settlement_bill_entry (id, tenant_id, paren_id, bill_no, wh_settlement_id, wh_settlement_bill_no, wh_settlement_entry_id, material_id, material_name, speci, model, unit, unit_price, qty, amt, batch_number, end_time, batch_no, factory_id, factory_code, factory_name, source_bill_type, source_bill_id, source_bill_no, source_entry_id, supplier_id, supplier_name, del_flag, sort_order, create_time) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.parenId}, #{e.billNo}, #{e.whSettlementId}, #{e.whSettlementBillNo}, #{e.whSettlementEntryId}, #{e.materialId}, #{e.materialName}, #{e.speci}, #{e.model}, #{e.unit}, #{e.unitPrice}, #{e.qty}, #{e.amt}, #{e.batchNumber}, #{e.endTime}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.factoryId}, #{e.factoryCode}, #{e.factoryName}, #{e.sourceBillType}, #{e.sourceBillId}, #{e.sourceBillNo}, #{e.sourceEntryId}, #{e.supplierId}, #{e.supplierName}, 0, #{e.sortOrder}, now())
mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, paren_id, bill_no, wh_settlement_id, wh_settlement_bill_no, wh_settlement_entry_id, material_id, material_name, speci, model, unit, unit_price, qty, amt, batch_number, end_time, batch_no, factory_id, factory_code, factory_name, source_bill_type, source_bill_id, source_bill_no, source_entry_id, supplier_id, supplier_name, del_flag, delete_by, delete_time, sort_order from supp_settlement_bill_entry where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) order by sort_order, id
mapper.update: update supp_settlement_bill set audit_status = 1, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (audit_status = 0 or audit_status is null)
mapper.select: select max(bill_no) from supp_settlement_bill where bill_no like concat(#{prefix}, '%') and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
